linking_strategies.full_mesh: All notes in cluster link to all other notes (bi-directional)
linking_strategies.linear: Notes link in sequence A→B→C (still bi-directional)
linking_strategies.hub_spoke: Hub note links to all spokes, spokes link back to hub
